Our Immigration Services

Comprehensive immigration solutions tailored to your needs

Express Entry

Fast-track your Canadian permanent residence through the Federal Skilled Worker, Federal Skilled Trades, and Canadian Experience Class programs.

PNP Applications

Navigate provincial nomination programs across Canada to find the best pathway for your immigration journey.

Family Sponsorship

Reunite with your loved ones in Canada through spouse, partner, children, and parent sponsorship programs.

Study Permits

Pursue your education in Canada with comprehensive study permit application assistance.

Immigration Appeals

Expert representation for immigration appeals at the Immigration Appeal Division (IAD) and Federal Court.

Visitor Visa

Assistance with temporary resident visas, super visas, and business visitor applications.

Work Permits

Support for LMIA-based work permits, CUSMA/NAFTA work permits, and other temporary work programs.

Business Immigration

Guidance for entrepreneurs and investors looking to establish or invest in Canadian businesses.

ADS Immigration

ADS Immigration Services helps individuals, families, and employers navigate Canadian immigration. Licensed RCIC. Expert guidance. Proven results.
